title: Garlicky Velvety Tunisian Eggplant Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful North African dish featuring roasted eggplant, a blend of spices, and a velvety texture.

ingredients.name: eggplant
ingredients.notes: any color, but purple is classic

instructions: Cut the eggplant in half lengthwise and scoop out the flesh, leaving a shell of about 1/4 inch.
In a large bowl, mix together the onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper (if using).
Add the chopped lemongrass and eggplant flesh to the bowl and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and drizzle with olive oil.
Roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender and lightly browned.
In a blender or food processor, puree the roasted eggplant mixture with the chickpeas until smooth.
Return the mixture to the baking dish and stir in 1 cup of water.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with sumac and chopped fresh herbs (if desired).
